title: senecio cochabambensis
intro: Senecio cochabambensis, also known as "Ratte de Cochabamba", is a plant species in the dandelion family native to Bolivia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio cochabambensis include treating fever, cough, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as being used as a diuretic to reduce water retention. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Senecio cochabambensis can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
